bead.title: artifacts backend: GraphQL Artifact type + artifacts query + resolver
bead.description:
Add the GraphQL Artifact type and artifacts query to schema.graphql and implement the resolver.

Artifact type fields: id, path, title, mediaType, generatedBy (runId, promptSummary, sourceHashMatch bool), staleness (fresh/stale/missing), ddxFrontmatter, description, updatedAt.

artifacts(projectID, mediaType, search, first, after): query scanning .ddx sidecar files (.ddx.yaml alongside artifacts) and the document library. Resolver reads FEAT-007 doc graph for documents; reads .ddx/plugins/**/*.* sidecars for other artifact types. Returns Relay cursor connection.

Note: existing ExecutionRun type in schema is unrelated (exec-definition results). New Artifact type is independent.
bead.acceptance:
1. Artifact type present in schema with all fields.
2. artifacts query returns paginated results scoped to a projectID.
3. mediaType filter narrows results correctly.
4. search parameter matches title and path.
5. Resolver handles missing sidecars gracefully (no crash, artifact omitted or mediaType=unknown).
6. Go tests cover resolver with fixture project containing markdown, image, and unknown-type artifacts.
